channel.title: Thoughts on QuACS
channel.description: Recent content in Thoughts on QuACS

item.title: The course industrial complex
item.description: Around 2019, if you spent any time on social media, you could not avoid them. Boot camps, coding tutorials, ebooks with titles like “From Zero to Developer in 12 Weeks,” video courses promising a career change by the end of the month. They were everywhere — in ads, in newsletters, in the bios of people who had learned to code six months earlier and were now teaching others to do the same.
